mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, care_plan_id, indicator_code, value_numeric, value_text, source, device_info, recorded_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM patient_reported_data WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patient_reported_data ( tenant_id, patient_id, care_plan_id, indicator_code, value_numeric, value_text, source, device_info, recorded_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{carePlanId}, #{indicatorCode}, #{valueNumeric}, #{valueText}, #{source}, #{deviceInfo, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{recordedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE patient_reported_data SET patient_id = #{patientId}, care_plan_id = #{carePlanId}, indicator_code = #{indicatorCode}, value_numeric = #{valueNumeric}, value_text = #{valueText}, source = #{source}, device_info = #{deviceInfo, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, recorded_at = #{recordedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
